records.ety: [L. convalscere; con- + valescere to grow strong, v. incho. of valere to be strong. See Valiant.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Convalesced (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Convalescing.]

defs: To recover health and strength gradually, after sickness or weakness; as, a patient begins to convalesce.
